name: AssessTEAM
description: Cloud-based app, run traditional reviews, goal setting, 360-degree reviews, and real-time feedback. $2 per person, try for free! Learn more about AssessTEAM

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Love it! I'm so glad I found this software. It's affordable and just what I was looking for!
reviews.review_pros: The ease of use and onboarding + the budget-friendly pricing!
reviews.review_cons: Nothing at all. So far, I do not have a complaint.

reviews.review_description: It has been very great and the level of service is consistent since the beginning. Rajat has been very helpful.
reviews.review_pros: I get the best help from our Account Manager, Rajat. He has been very helpful from the beginning, and is quick to respond to our concerns.
reviews.review_cons: None at all. We like AssessTEAM and it has been very helpful with our evaluations and surveys. It woud help if it harness AI to bring more comprehensive summary or highlights of evaluations.

reviews.review_description: I'm not a huge fan. It's ok, but for the end user. It's difficult as an administrator to manage in public safety with frequent schedule/supervisor changes for employees.
reviews.review_pros: It is nice to have reminders of when you want employees to be evaluated. It's a central point to evaluate, send, discuss, and receive signatures from the employee.
reviews.review_cons: Set up is difficult. With change in the organization and it not being kept up with, I have to delete every evaluator from each employee and re assign every evaluator to an employee. This is HOURS of work. I ought to be able to great groups of employees and assign them that way. If it's possible, I'd like to know how.

reviews.review_description: Overall, after I got used to it, I enjoy using it. It was a little complex initially to set up our employee's and the assessments.
reviews.review_pros: I like the ease of being able to quickly assess team members. It allows me to reflect on team member performance quickly and in a meaningful way.
reviews.review_cons: With the structure of our firm, the format of managers is difficult to use in AssessTeam, because our team is not always a top down manager style.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall I have found the system easy to navigate and build our team and evaluation schedule. We have our first rollout this week and we are very excited to see the results!
reviews.review_pros: It allows for flexible evaluation models which helps create more well rounded feedback. The evaluations are 100% customizable but the system comes with dozens of prebuilt options that can be tweaked as needed. The support team is fantastic and responsive.
reviews.review_cons: Minor UI issues - why does it automatically alphabetize my evaluation questions? I build them in a specific order/flow, then it sorts them alphabetically and then I have to go back in a rearrange everything. I would like to see some ability to input financial data as a marker on an evaluation. I do not see using the Goals functionality too much at this time, since the scales and measurements are not necessarily what I am looking for.

reviews.review_description: overall good - I have recommended it to several business owners and they are now using it. I hope it continues to get better
reviews.review_pros: the price is my favorite part. THere are a lot of other options out there but they are very expensive.
reviews.review_cons: over the years there have been some glitches that have caused some employees to see who reviewed them even when it was supposed to be anonymous

reviews.review_title: Great tool for structured performance appraisals and 360-degree feedback
reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience with AssessTEAM has been very positive. It has helped streamline performance appraisals and made feedback more consistent and data-driven. The 360 feedback feature, in particular, adds significant value by encouraging transparency and more meaningful performance conversations.
reviews.review_pros: What I liked most about AssessTEAM is the 360-degree feedback feature. It makes it easy to gather input from managers, peers, and other stakeholders in one place, which gives a much more balanced and holistic view of performance. The performance appraisal process is well-structured, and the platform is intuitive to use without requiring extensive training
reviews.review_cons: Initial setup can take a little time, especially when configuring appraisal cycles for the first time.

reviews.review_title: Flexible and efficient performance management solution
reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience with AssessTEAM has been very positive. It has simplified performance reviews and improved visibility into employee performance. The platform is reliable, easy to use, and well-suited for organizations looking to formalize and scale their performance management process.
reviews.review_pros: AssessTEAM offers a flexible performance appraisal tool that makes it easy to set up review cycles and collect feedback across teams. I especially liked the reporting and insights, which help identify strengths, improvement areas, and overall performance trends. The workflow is straightforward and saves time compared to manual or spreadsheet-based reviews.
reviews.review_cons: Some advanced features take time to fully explore and configure and initial setup can take some time as well.

reviews.review_description: Worked extremely well with our field employees and the use of the program. I highly recommend this system.
reviews.review_pros: The customer service provided has always been top notch. They truly care about their clients and continually reach out for feedback.
reviews.review_cons: It is great for smaller companies, but we outgrew the system. As a standalone product it does a great job.

reviews.review_title: A Valuable Tool for Tracking Performance
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, I found AssessTEAM easy to use and very helpful in tracking performance and providing feedback. A few features could be smoother, but it’s a great tool for supporting team development.
reviews.review_pros: What I liked most about AssessTEAM is how user-friendly and organized it is. It provides clear, actionable insights for performance improvement.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes it takes a few extra steps to navigate certain features, but overall the system is very helpful.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Great! The support team have been amazing with their ability to schedule a call and hop on a quick Zoom. Kept the process going smoothly and quickly.
reviews.review_pros: Great customer support. Got my first assessment up and running quickly
reviews.review_cons: Still too early to have a good list of cons. Nothing really jumps out so far

reviews.review_description: My experience with AssessTeam has been very positive and user-friendly. The platform keeps the process organized and saves time, making performance management smooth and clear. Overall, it’s a reliable and effective tool that supports productivity, accountability, and transparent communication within the team.
reviews.review_pros: I especially appreciate the Evaluation Templates, which make creating and managing assessments simple and efficient.
reviews.review_cons: I’m still unsure where I can view the reminders that have already been sent to employees—for example, how many times a reminder has been sent. Could you please let me know where I can access this information?

reviews.review_description: We are very happy and satisfied with AssessTEAM! The customer service is truly excellent and they are very, very responsive. They made the entire performance management and reporting process very seamless and structured for us.
reviews.review_pros: AssessTEAM is extremely user-friendly and makes work a lot easier for us. The portal is very easy to navigate and the reports are detailed and informative. It made the entire performance management process very structured for us.
reviews.review_cons: There should be a detailed User Guide in the portal.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: My overall experience has been good with AssessTEAM so far and our employees find the product easy to use and navigate.
reviews.review_pros: The customer service for AssessTEAM has been outstanding. The turnaround time for any questions I have is incredibly fast. The product is also very simple to use.
reviews.review_cons: The product can still use some work in terms of customization and making bulk changes easily to the performance evaluations.

reviews.review_description: Excellent support from the team, from initial demo, to set up and roll out. Always very responsiveness to any questions
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use and set up, customer support, and ability to move from paper based to online processes in a small business
reviews.review_cons: Just that we were unable to integrate into our new platform as we move forward with digitising all our systems.

reviews.review_pros: It's customizable to be able to suit our needs. The team is always ready and willing to assist if we have any questions.
reviews.review_cons: We cannot export the results into a pdf, only excel is available. We have to print - save as pdf each review individually which isn't the most efficient.

reviews.review_title: Increase the variety of questions and scoring system
reviews.review_description: there are some challenges with the reporting but the team was able to fix it properly. I think what you need to focus on the range and types of questions. A form like MS office has more variety than assess team. also, the flexibility of rating and scoring

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: The platform is easy to use. Highly recommend especially the graphics are also easy to follow as a user.
reviews.review_pros: It's user friendly and very secure. I like that it is possible to sign within the system. The auto generation of signature is good.
reviews.review_cons: Had technical issues once. The support team came in handy to troubleshoot and restored my access. Thanks to [sensitive content hidden].

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: We have just begun using the product, and so far it looks to be a great tool for our 20 member team!
reviews.review_pros: The ease of set up and the personal touch my rep added. We are new to employee reviews, and this product is very easy to use.
reviews.review_cons: As stated in the last answer, we are really new to the product, so we have not used others so we really have not found anything to not like yet.

reviews.review_description: They have great customer service and are easy to work with.
reviews.review_pros: Easily accessible support. Keeps our review process organized.
reviews.review_cons: I can't think of anything but I couldn't leave the field blank

reviews.review_description: Overall, the support is fantastic. The staff is very helpful with questions and they are very respond really quickly.
reviews.review_pros: the ability to send evaluations with quick access to all staff.
reviews.review_cons: i wouldnt say con but a little draw back is that it does take some time to get to know the site and learn the ins and outs of the features.

reviews.review_title: A simple and effective performance review system
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Assessteam is a very easy to use program to track my team's performance. It let's us customize the KPIs and goals, and allows us to pick an evaluation schedule of our choice. The convenience of using mobile apps to do monthly reviews on the go is a bonus and the customer team support was very approachable. Looking to leverage other features like time tracking also in the coming months.
reviews.review_pros: Customizable performance indicators, easy of use, support for mobile apps.
reviews.review_cons: Goal setting can be little more advanced and include OKRs

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It has been a pleasure to work with AssessTEAM. They are quick to respond and give training.
reviews.review_pros: [sensitive content hidden] and his team are very patient and helpful. He set up our profile and always is happy to assist with training.
reviews.review_cons: At this time, there is nothing to report.

reviews.review_description: Great -- 5* customer service! Software is easy to set up and use.
reviews.review_pros: My account rep, [sensitive content hidden], is awesome and he continues to be so helpful in finetuning our system. Easy to set up, video trainings are great, and once you get the hang of it, a great way to manage performance evaluations.
reviews.review_cons: A bit clunky around the language used, i.e. when setting goals they are called performance indicators, and having to got to different screens to do tasks. Also the performance evaluation provides the information but there isn't a way, unless you create it an evaluation, to document the actual performance conversation. It can be done but just a little clunky. Small in comparison to what I love about the ease and use of this software.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: The product is user friendly, and the after sales service is good.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing as of now as its been only six months of using the software and we use it for mid year review
